title: rosa viscaria
intro: Rosa viscaria, also known as the viscid rose or sticky rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Rosa viscaria can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
